entry.title: The Man Who Beat IBM
entry.quote: When IBM tried to reclaim control of the PC market with proprietary technology, Compaq CEO Rod Canion decided to create an open standard and share it with competitors—effectively giving away "the company jewels" to preserve innovation.

entry.title: xAI faces legal threat over alleged Colossus data center pollution in Memphis
entry.quote: NAACP demands a meeting to discuss xAI's alleged pollution in Memphis.

entry.title: AlphaGenome: AI for better understanding the genome
entry.quote: Our AlphaGenome model takes a long DNA sequence as input — up to 1 million letters, also known as base-pairs — and predicts thousands of molecular properties characterising its regulatory activity. It can also score the effects of genetic variants or mutations by comparing predictions of mutated sequences with unmutated ones.

entry.title: Modeling the World in 280 Characters
entry.quote: An exploration of the mindset, methods, and motivations behind crafting tiny, expressive shaders that combine code, art, and constraint.

entry.title: Bill Atkinson: Polaroids showing the Evolution of the Lisa GUI
entry.quote: Bill Atkinson shows and explains his binder of Polaroid photos which he took during the development of the Lisa, documenting the evolution of its graphical user interface.
